author: hi0b
content:
## Salvage from interrupted kickoff (agent IS4n-s15o)

A previous kickoff agent built a working draft of the protocol crate but was killed
when the outer claude-sandbox restarted, before any commits were made. The staged work
has been preserved as a patch at the repo root:

  .salvage-IS4n-s15o-protocol.patch  (888 lines, 29.8 KB)

The patch is visible to fresh kickoff worktrees because the bind mount covers the
whole project dir. Apply with:

  git apply ../../.salvage-IS4n-s15o-protocol.patch

(adjust the relative path from inside .worktrees/<your-worktree>/)

### What's in the patch

- crossbridge-protocol/Cargo.toml — serde, postcard (alloc), tokio (optional, behind `async` feature)
- crossbridge-protocol/src/lib.rs (321 lines) — all message types per .design/protocol.md:
  Register, RegisterResponse, Notification, SupervisorMessage, ClientRequest,
  SubmitIssue, SubmitAnswer, AnswerComment, Attachment, ServerResponse,
  plus ProtocolError + sync framing (write_message_sync / read_message_sync) +
  async framing (gated by `async` feature)
- crossbridge-protocol/tests/roundtrip.rs (201 lines) — sync roundtrip tests
- crossbridge-protocol/tests/async_io.rs (75 lines) — tokio async roundtrip tests
- Cargo.toml — root becomes workspace AND keeps existing crossbridge package; members = [".", "crossbridge-protocol"]
- Cargo.lock — updated for new deps
- shell.nix — adds clippy and rustfmt to nativeBuildInputs (needed for the agent_lint_commands the previous agent set up)
- src/main.rs, src/route.rs — pure `cargo fmt` artifacts, no semantic changes

### Architectural choice (different from issue spec)

The original spec says "workspace Cargo.toml at root, ... crates/crossbridge/ ...".
This salvage instead keeps src/ at the root and makes the root Cargo.toml both a
package and a workspace (members = [".", "crossbridge-protocol"]). Less churn, but
divergent from the spec. Decide whether to keep this shape or move src/ into
crates/crossbridge/ as the spec requires before applying the patch.

### Build status

- cargo build --workspace passes
- Tests not run

### Excluded from the patch (DO NOT apply)

The previous agent also modified .crosslink/hook-config.json — among other things,
it deleted the `sandbox.command` config that wraps kickoff agents in claude-sandbox.
That edit would break the sandbox isolation for subsequent kickoffs and has been
omitted from the patch. Don't recreate it. The agent_lint_commands and
agent_test_commands additions in that diff (cargo clippy / cargo fmt --check / cargo
test) are reasonable; you can re-add them by hand if useful, but make sure to keep
the sandbox.command setting intact.
